Home/Aseel dates in more useful forms.

From Khairpur’s date country

Aseel dates in more useful forms.

Khairpur is one of Pakistan’s best-known date-growing regions, and Aseel dates from this area carry a strong local reputation for flavour and quality. Beyond fresh fruit, the nursery’s public catalogue covers a full range of value-added date products — dry dates, date paste, syrup and powder — aimed at everyday households, food-service businesses and commercial buyers looking for a consistent supply of Khairpur-grown Aseel dates in the format that suits their use.

Request product availability →
Fresh fruitSeasonal Aseel date enquiries
TraditionalDry dates / chuhara
IngredientsDate paste and syrup
FormatDate powder enquiries

What buyers need to know

01

Fresh Aseel Dates

Promoted as hand-picked, premium-quality Khairpur dates, fresh Aseel is a seasonal product tied to the local harvest window. It suits households buying for daily consumption as well as retailers stocking up during peak season. Availability, grade and packaging must always be confirmed for the current season before ordering, since fresh fruit supply naturally varies through the year.

  • Seasonal availability
  • Retail and bulk enquiry
  • Packaging confirmation
02

Dry Dates / Chuhara

Dry dates, locally known as chuhara, are a traditional shelf-stable format that stores well beyond the fresh season. This makes them a practical choice for households wanting dates year-round, for gift packaging, and for wholesale buyers who need a product with a longer shelf life than fresh fruit.

  • Grade confirmation
  • Pack-size enquiry
  • Bulk quantity enquiry
03

Date Paste, Syrup and Powder

These value-added formats are relevant to bakeries, juice and dessert producers, and any food business looking for a natural date-based sweetener instead of refined sugar. Date paste works well in bars and baked goods, syrup suits drinks and glazes, and powder is useful where a dry, easily-dosed ingredient is needed in production.

  • Food-business use cases
  • MOQ and pack size required
  • Shelf-life confirmation required
04

Buying fresh vs. processed

Choosing between fresh dates, chuhara and processed formats mainly comes down to intended use and storage. Fresh Aseel suits immediate consumption and gifting during season; chuhara suits longer home storage; paste, syrup and powder suit buyers who need a stable ingredient for food production rather than a fruit to eat directly.

  • Personal and family use
  • Retail resale
  • Food manufacturing input
